oligos.name: Tn5-T5 barcoded transposon adapter
oligos.role: Barcoded Tn5 transposon (transferred strand + MErev); introduces the T5 cellular barcode and Mosaic End A during tagmentation

components.name: Tn5-T5 top (transferred) strand
components.role: Transferred strand: Universal Connector A + 8-nt T5 barcode + linker + 19-bp Mosaic End (ME)

components.name: MErev (5'Phos)
components.role: Non-transferred strand (5'-phosphorylated), anneals to the ME of every T5/T7 oligo

oligos.notes: 24 T5 barcodes (8 nt, inserted after ...TCCACGC): T5-1 TATAGCCT, T5-2 ATAGAGGC, T5-3 CCTATCCT, T5-4 GGCTCTGA, T5-5 AGGCGAAG, T5-6 TAATCTTA, T5-7 CAGGACGT, T5-8 GTACTGAC, T5-9 TAGGTATG, T5-10 AACACCTA, T5-11 CTCCGAAC, T5-12 CAACGGCA, T5-13 CAATGTAG, T5-14 GGCTACCC, T5-15 AAAGTCCG, T5-16 TTCCGCGG, T5-17 AGGCACTT, T5-18 CTTCAGTG, T5-19 GCCGGTAG, T5-20 TTCAATCC, T5-21 CCACACAC, T5-22 ATATTATC, T5-23 CCGAAGCA, T5-24 GTATCGGT. Full example T5-1: TCGTCGGCAGCGTCTCCACGCTATAGCCTGCGATCGAGGACGGCAGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG. Assembled at 12.5 µM with homemade Tn5 (pTXB1-Tn5, Addgene 60240).

oligos.name: Tn5-T7 barcoded transposon adapter
oligos.role: Barcoded Tn5 transposon (transferred strand + MErev); introduces the T7 cellular barcode and Mosaic End B during tagmentation

components.name: Tn5-T7 top (transferred) strand
components.role: Transferred strand: Universal Connector B handle + 8-nt T7 barcode + linker + 19-bp Mosaic End (ME)

oligos.notes: 25 T7 barcodes (8 nt, inserted after ...CCCTGTCC): T7-1 CGAGTAAT, T7-2 TCTCCGGA, T7-3 AATGAGCG, T7-4 GGAATCTC, T7-5 TTCTGAAT, T7-6 ACGAATTC, T7-7 AGCTTCAG, T7-8 GCGCATTA, T7-9 CATAGCCG, T7-10 TTCGCGGA, T7-11 GCGCGAGA, T7-12 CTATCGCT, T7-13 TGTCCGCG, T7-14 TTAAACTT, T7-15 ACCACAAC, T7-16 GCCTCTGG, T7-17 TCGCCCAC, T7-18 CACTAGGC, T7-19 TCGAAGCC, T7-20 GCATGTAC, T7-21 GTTCGAGT, T7-22 CCGGGCGC, T7-23 AGATTTAA, T7-24 CACCATTG, T7-25 AATAAGAC. 24×25 = 600 T5/T7 combinations index single cells across 96-well plates. Full example T7-1: GTCTCGTGGGCTCGGCTGTCCCTGTCCCGAGTAATCACCGTCTCCGCCTCAGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG.

oligos.name: TnExtMErev / common annealing primer
oligos.role: 5'-phosphorylated non-transferred (bottom) strand common to all Tn5 transposon assemblies
oligos.notes: 5'-phosphorylated. Annealed with each T5/T7 oligo (95 °C then ramp to 75 °C) before Tn5 loading.

oligos.name: i5 index library PCR primer (custom Nextera)
oligos.role: P5 grafting primer; adds P5 + i5 library index to the T5 side during PCR
oligos.notes: Used at 25 µM in the custom-recipe (Nextera) PCR.

oligos.name: i7 index library PCR primer (custom Nextera)
oligos.role: P7 grafting primer; adds P7 + i7 library index to the T7 side during PCR
oligos.notes: Used at 25 µM in the custom-recipe (Nextera) PCR.

oligos.name: Custom Read 1 sequencing primer (Extended Mosaic End A)
oligos.role: Read 1 sequencing primer (custom recipe); primes into the genomic insert

oligos.name: Custom Read 2 sequencing primer (Extended Mosaic End B)
oligos.role: Read 2 sequencing primer (custom recipe); primes into the genomic insert from the T7 side

oligos.name: Custom Index 1 sequencing primer (RC of Extended Mosaic End B)
oligos.role: Index 1 sequencing primer (custom recipe); reads T7 barcode (first 8 bp) then i7 barcode (last 8 bp) over 43 cycles

oligos.name: Custom Index 2 sequencing primer (Grafted P5)
oligos.role: Index 2 sequencing primer (custom recipe); reads i5 barcode (first 8 bp) then T5 barcode (last 8 bp) over 37 cycles

oligos.name: TruSeq connector forward primer (1st PCR)
oligos.role: Mosaic-TruSeq 1st-PCR forward primer; appends the TruSeq Read1 handle onto Universal Connector A

oligos.name: TruSeq connector reverse primer (1st PCR)
oligos.role: Mosaic-TruSeq 1st-PCR reverse primer; appends the TruSeq Read2 handle onto the T7 handle

oligos.name: NEB index primer (P7, 2nd PCR TruSeq)
oligos.role: TruSeq 2nd-PCR P7 grafting + sample index primer
oligos.notes: Enables sequencing on the standard Illumina TruSeq recipe (~15-fold lower cost); [index] is an 8-nt NEBNext sample index.

oligos.name: Mosaic-A primer (Tn5ME-A, FC-121-1030)
oligos.role: Standard Nextera/ATAC transposon adapter A (used for control ATAC-seq)

oligos.name: Mosaic-B primer (Tn5ME-B, FC-121-1031)
oligos.role: Standard Nextera/ATAC transposon adapter B (used for control ATAC-seq)

oligos.name: Spike-in library amplification primer (P5 side)
oligos.role: Amplifies balancing spike-in library (variable N block replaces constant bases to balance signal per cycle)
oligos.notes: 21-nt random region (written NNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNN in the source).

oligos.name: Spike-in library amplification primer (P7 side)
oligos.notes: 27-nt random region (written NNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNN in the source). ~15% spike-in + 10% PhiX pooled to balance constant bases per detection cycle.

final_library.source_label: Single-cell itChIP-seq library (custom Nextera recipe, Illumina)
final_library.annotated_library_sequence: P5 [AATGATACGGCGACCACCGAGATCTACAC] - i5[SAMPLE_INDEX:8] - ConnA[TCGTCGGCAGCGTCTCCACGC] - T5[CELL_BARCODE:8] - linker+ME_A[GCGATCGAGGACGGCAGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG] - insert[CDNA] - ME_B(rc)[CTGTCTCTTATACACATCTGAGGCGGAGACGGTG] - T7[CELL_BARCODE:8] - ConnB(rc)[GGACAGGGACAGCCGAGCCCACGAGAC] - i7[SAMPLE_INDEX:8] - P7(rc)[ATCTCGTATGCCGTCTTCTGCTTG]
annotation_lines: linker + ME(A)     : GCGATCGAGGACGGCAGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG   (Read1 primer binds here)
ME(B, rc) + linker : CTGTCTCTTATACACATCTGAGGCGGAGACGGTG   (Index1 primer binds here)
The two [CELL_BARCODE:8] tokens are the combinatorial T5 x T7 cell index (24 x 25 = 600 wells).

TruSeq variant: P5/ConnA junction becomes ...ACACTCTTTCCCTACACGACGCTCTTCCGATCT... and the T7/i7 end becomes ...AGATCGGAAGAGCACACGTCTGAACTCCAGTCAC[SAMPLE_INDEX:8]ATCTCGTATGCCGTCTTCTGCTTG for the standard Illumina recipe.

evidence.locator: Single-cell itChIP-seq library (custom Nextera recipe, Illumina)

library_generation.title: Cell fixation & chromatin opening
library_generation.summary: Formaldehyde-fixed cells are sorted into hypotonic buffer and opened with 0.3% SDS at 62 °C, then quenched with Triton X-100.
library_generation.note: 1–1,000,000 cells (or one cell/well by FACS) in 5 µl hypotonic buffer (0.3% SDS, 20 mM HEPES, 10 mM KCl, 10% glycerol, 0.2% NP-40); 62 °C 10 min, 600 rpm; add 1.2 µl 10% Triton X-100, 37 °C 60 min. SDS-enhanced opening at high temperature relaxes chromatin genome-wide without disrupting protein–DNA binding, enabling even (unbiased) tagmentation.
library_generation.product:
5'- =========== crosslinked, SDS-opened chromatin =========== -3'
3'- =========== (genomic DNA, proteins bound) =============== -5'

library_generation.title: In-situ tagmentation & cellular indexing
library_generation.summary: Barcoded Tn5-T5/Tn5-T7 transposomes simultaneously fragment genomic DNA and insert T5/T7 cell-barcoded ME adapters (37 °C 1 h; single cells 55 °C 30 min).
library_generation.note: Per single cell: 2 µl 5X TMgCl-DMF, 2 µl 1.25 µM Tn5-T5, 2 µl 1.25 µM Tn5-T7, 10 ng yeast tRNA carrier, to 10 µl; stop with 250 mM EDTA. Each cell receives a unique T5xT7 combination.
library_generation.product:
5'- TCGTCGGCAGCGTCTCCACGC[T5]GCGATCGAGGACGGCAGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG====INSERT====CTGTCTCTTATACACATCTGAGGCGGAGACGGTG[T7]GGACAGGGACAGCCGAGCCCACGAGAC -3'
3'-           <-- complementary strand (9-bp gaps filled during PCR) -->                                                                            -5'

library_generation.title: Pool cells, release chromatin & immunoprecipitate
library_generation.summary: Indexed single cells are pooled, chromatin is released by brief sonication, and the target factor is captured by antibody + protein A beads (or streptavidin beads for biotin-tagged factors).
library_generation.note: Resuspend in releasing buffer, 30 min RT, sonicate 20% power 4x(15s on/30s off), dilute SDS, spin to collect soluble chromatin. Incubate with 0.1–1.0 µg antibody overnight at 4 °C, then protein A Dynabeads 2 h; low/high salt washes. bio-itChIP uses M280 streptavidin beads at 350 mM NaCl.
library_generation.product: beads-Ab~[ T5 ]--tagmented ChIP fragment--[ T7 ]  (target-enriched, still barcoded)

library_generation.title: Reverse-crosslink & purify DNA
library_generation.summary: Elute, reverse-crosslink (70 °C, 3 h), proteinase K digest, and phenol–chloroform purify the adapter-flanked ChIP DNA.
library_generation.note: Purified DNA carries the T5/T7-barcoded ME arms and is ready for PCR without end-repair/ligation.

library_generation.title: PCR amplification with i5/i7 indices (custom Nextera)
library_generation.summary: KAPA PCR (72 °C 5 min; 18–20 cycles) with the i5 and i7 index primers grafts P5+i5 and P7+i7 to yield the final sequenceable library.
library_generation.note: i5 primer: 5'-AATGATACGGCGACCACCGAGATCTACAC[i5]TCGTCGGCAGCGTC-3'; i7 primer: 5'-CAAGCAGAAGACGGCATACGAGAT[i7]GTCTCGTGGGCTCGG-3'. 0.5X + 0.5X AMPure XP double size-selection to 200–1000 bp. A second level of barcoding (i5/i7) separates pooled itChIP libraries.

library_generation.title: (Alternative) Mosaic-TruSeq conversion for standard Illumina recipe
library_generation.summary: Two-round Q5 PCR: round 1 connector F/R adds TruSeq Read1/Read2 handles onto the Tn5 arms; round 2 NEB universal (P5) + NEB index (P7) grafts P5/P7 to make a standard-recipe library (~15-fold cheaper sequencing).
library_generation.note: Connector F: 5'-ACACTCTTTCCCTACACGACGCTCTTCCGATCTTCGTCGGCAGCGTCTCCACGC-3'; Connector R: 5'-GACTGGAGTTCAGACGTGTGCTCTTCCGATCTGTCTCGTGGGCTCGGCTGTCCCTGT-3'; ExoI cleanup between rounds. NEB universal P5 + NEB [index] P7 in round 2 (5 cycles).

library_sequencing.primer: Custom Read 1 primer / Extended Mosaic End A: 5'-GCGATCGAGGACGGCAGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG-3'
library_sequencing.note: Sequences the tagmented genomic (ChIP) insert from the T5 side. Primer anneals to the bottom strand across the linker+ME(A) and extends into the insert.
library_sequencing.diagram:
Read 1 primer (Ext ME-A)
                5'-GCGATCGAGGACGGCAGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG----------->  (69 nt into insert)
top     5'- ...[T5]GCGATCGAGGACGGCAGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG[====== genomic insert ======]... -3'
                   ||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||
bottom  3'- ...[T5]CGCTAGCTCCTGCCGTCTACACATATTCTCTGTC[====== genomic insert ======]... -5'

library_sequencing.primer: Custom Index 1 primer / RC of Extended ME-B: 5'-CTGTCTCTTATACACATCTGAGGCGGAGACGGTG-3'
library_sequencing.note: Decodes the cell/library index on the T7 side: first 8 bp = T7 cell barcode, then 27-bp Universal Connector B, last 8 bp = i7 library index (8 + 27 + 8 = 43).
library_sequencing.diagram:
Index 1 primer (RC Ext ME-B)
                    5'-CTGTCTCTTATACACATCTGAGGCGGAGACGGTG----------->  reads [T7:8]+ConnB(27)+[i7:8] = 43 cyc
top     5'- ...[insert]CTGTCTCTTATACACATCTGAGGCGGAGACGGTG[T7:8]GGACAGGGACAGCCGAGCCCACGAGAC[i7:8]... -3'
                       ||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||
bottom  3'- ...[insert]GACAGAGAATATGTGTAGACTCCGCCTCTGCCAC[T7:8].......(ConnB comp)........[i7:8]... -5'

library_sequencing.note: Decodes the cell/library index on the T5 side: first 8 bp = i5 library index, then 21-bp Universal Connector A, last 8 bp = T5 cell barcode (8 + 21 + 8 = 37).
library_sequencing.diagram:
Index 2 primer (grafted P5)
        5'-AATGATACGGCGACCACCGAGATCTACAC----------->  reads [i5:8]+ConnA(21)+[T5:8] = 37 cyc
top     5'-AATGATACGGCGACCACCGAGATCTACAC[i5:8]TCGTCGGCAGCGTCTCCACGC[T5:8]... -3'
           |||||||||||||||||||||||||||||
bottom  3'-TTACTATGCCGCTGGTGGCTCTAGATGTG[i5:8]AGCAGCCGTCGCAGAGGTGCG[T5:8]... -5'

library_sequencing.primer: Custom Read 2 primer / Extended Mosaic End B: 5'-CACCGTCTCCGCCTCAGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG-3'
library_sequencing.note: Sequences the genomic insert from the T7 side (paired end). Primer anneals to the top strand across the ME(B) region and extends leftward into the insert.
library_sequencing.diagram:
top     5'- ...[====== genomic insert ======]CTGTCTCTTATACACATCTGAGGCGGAGACGGTG[T7]... -3'
                                             ||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||
bottom  3'- ...[====== genomic insert ======]GACAGAGAATATGTGTAGACTCCGCCTCTGCCAC[T7]... -5'
                                 <-----------GACAGAGAATATGTGTAGACTCCGCCTCTGCCAC-5'
                                 (69 nt into insert)   Read 2 primer (Ext ME-B), 5'->3' shown right-to-left

title: sc-itChIP-seq
description: itChIP-seq (simultaneous indexing and tagmentation-based ChIP-seq) profiles histone modifications and non-histone DNA-binding proteins genome-wide from low-input samples and single cells. Fixed cells are opened with SDS at 62 °C, then tagmented in situ by barcoded Tn5 transposomes carrying combinatorial T5/T7 cellular indices; indexed chromatin from pooled single cells is immunoprecipitated with an antibody (or captured on streptavidin beads for biotin-tagged factors), reverse-crosslinked, purified, and PCR-amplified with i5/i7 library indices (custom Nextera) or, alternatively, converted to a standard TruSeq library. Paired 69-bp reads capture the tagmented genomic (ChIP) fragment, while index reads decode the T5/T7 cell barcodes and the i5/i7 library indices.

reference.label: Profiling chromatin states using single-cell itChIP-seq

throughput.summary: Low-input (as few as 100 cells) to single cells; a pool of 1x96 to 3x96 single-cell wells processed per assay. sc-itChIP yields ~9,016 uniquely mapped reads per cell (1,869 ESC-EpiLC single cells profiled; ~8,100 reads/cell in E7.75–E8.25 cardiac cells).
throughput.cells: Tens to thousands of single cells per assay; hundreds of single cells profiled per experiment
throughput.rna: N/A (chromatin/DNA assay; companion scRNA-seq used a modified Smart-seq2 with 8-nt cell barcode + 8-nt UMI on oligo-dT)
throughput.dna: ~9,000 unique reads per single cell; ~94% mapping rate; median FRiP ~52%; size-selected 200–1000 bp fragments

publication.statistical_model: No parametric count distribution (not Poisson/negative-binomial UMI counting). Binary present/absent binding signal per allele; enrichment quantified as ChIP signal (FPM/RPKM), accuracy assessed by ROC/AUC; single cells clustered by signature scores and ordered by Monocle2 (DDRTree) pseudotime; peaks called with MACS2 (--broad).

other.label: Sequencing platforms
other.value: PE150 on HiSeq X-Ten / NovaSeq 6000 (TruSeq); custom recipe on HiSeq 2500 (69+43+37+69 bp)

other.label: Antibodies
other.value: H3K4me3 (Millipore 04-745), H3K27me3 (Millipore 07-449), H3K27ac (Abcam ab4729), EZH2 (CST S246S), RNA Pol II CTD (Abcam ab5408)

data_processing.summary: Reads are demultiplexed into single cells by the combinatorial T5/T7 cell barcodes carried in Read1/Read2 (custom scripts; index reads with any mismatch discarded), adapter/quality trimmed, aligned to mm10, deduplicated, and reduced to uniquely mapped non-duplicate reads before broad peak calling; aggregated single-cell or low-input profiles are then used for coverage tracks, signature-score clustering, and Monocle2 pseudotime. There is no UMI/parametric count model — binding is scored as binary present/absent per allele.
data_processing.statistical_model: none — binary present/absent binding per allele; no UMI/parametric count model (accuracy assessed by ROC/AUC)
